import json, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, itertools, math, statistics, collections, pprint, sys, textwrap

quran_path='/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path='/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json'
with open(quran_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata=json.load(f)
len(qdata)

with open(hadith_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata=json.load(f)
len(hdata), hdata[0].keys()

orig="وَلَوْلا دَعْوَةُ هَارُونَ لَبَلَغَتِ الْأَرْضُ مُصْلًا وَإِنَافًا"
snippet="وَلَوْلا د...وَإِنَافًا"
def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics
    s=''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch)!='Mn')
    # unify alef forms
    s=re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', s)
    s=re.sub('ى','ي', s)
    s=re.sub('ؤ','و', s)
    s=re.sub('ئ','ي', s)
    s=re.sub('ة','ه', s)
    s=re.sub('[^ء-ي0-9 ]+',' ', s)
    s=re.sub('\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s
norm_orig=normalize(orig)
norm_orig

# normalize search
target_norm=normalize("وَلَوْلَا دَفْعُ اللَّهِ النَّاسَ بَعْضَهُم بِبَعْضٍ لَفَسَدَتِ الْأَرْضُ")
hits=[]
for rec in qdata:
    if target_norm in norm_db_text(rec['ayah_text']):
        hits.append(rec)
hits
